text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Our ideal partner?! Are you asking for love
advice, City?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No, this is for my job. The magazine I'm working
with is running a questionnaire.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I don't really have an answer of my own... I
wanted to see how you two would respond.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Got it. Wait, isn't this, like, a super common
question? I thought you'd have an answer for it by
now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I've always evaded it one way or another. You
know, "I'm trying to focus on racing right now"
type excuses.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But since a lot of readers look to the magazine
for help, I think I should take this seriously.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There's such a thing as too serious, you know? Anyway, my ideal partner...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh, got it! It just clicked! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: My type's someone who knows how to turn up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're just describing yourself. Talk about major
main character syndrome.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, not my fault I'm so fun. ☆ Still, I'm not
saying they need to be my twin!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
They could be introverted for all I care! If the two
of us can take on the world, then that's true love
in my book!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hold up! That just might be it... Maybe everyone's my type! Free love! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wow, well... You're just... built different...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Literally no one thinks like that.
Ah, my nail tips are coming off.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, my ideal partner's gotta be really cool
and a little gangsta. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
For real? I'd hate having someone think they're
the boss of me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm not saying I wanna date an actual thug. Like, I don't want someone who starts messing with me out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I just want them to be a little bad, you know? But
they also need to have a sensitive side.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But they've gotta be, like, a super cool hottie... The type that makes your heart skip. Know what I'm saying?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Everyone's got their preferences, I guess.
I'm a little surprised you guys put so much
thought into it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I was just trying to come up with something
interesting. Don't overthink it. What's the first
thing that comes to mind?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, I think I found it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Someone who's stronger than me—physically and
mentally. If they can't beat me, they're not worth
my time.

text_block_list.name: Jordan & Helios
text_block_list.text: Sooo true!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That answer is so like you City—unrelated, but are you guys hungry? Let's grab a bite at the school store.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Woooo! ☆ Let's get something to celebrate City
discovering her type!
